name: Big Indoor Golf
about: Big Indoor Golf is a golf simulation venue featuring multiple Trackman simulator bays. The facility is known for its large, open bays designed to provide a more realistic golfing experience, with 20-foot widths and 15-foot ball-to-screen distances. Pricing is structured on a per-bay hourly basis with off-peak and peak rates, and bay reservations can be made online. The venue operates with specific main season and reduced offseason hours.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman simulators with 400+ courses including 60+ PGA Tour courses
Luxuriously large bays with 20ft width and 15ft ball-to-screen distance for accuracy
Alcohol-free environment focused on the golf experience
Instant replays at 1080p/240 fps with impact location tracking
Convenient ball return system in the oversized bays

food_and_drink.notes: No information on food availability provided.
The venue explicitly advertises an alcohol-free environment.

simulator_hardware.notes: Fully loaded Trackman simulators with 400+ courses and premium turf.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify whether club rentals are available. It is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The facility operates an alcohol-free environment and does not mention any food options. It is best to confirm their policy on outside food and drink directly with the venue.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required to play 18 holes. This information can likely be obtained by contacting the venue directly or during the online booking process.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The provided information does not mention specific features or policies for children or juniors. It is recommended to contact the venue directly to inquire about their kid-friendliness.
